_comment: Curated demo disruptions — render as pulsing translucent polygons + rows in EventFeed. Real-world sources (NOAA, Open-Meteo, IMB) feed in alongside these. Keep count low so the map doesn't turn into a heatmap of red.

disruptions.title: North Sea storm — Rotterdam approaches
disruptions.detail: 40 kn sustained winds; port authority advising reduced pilotage. 6 vessels holding at anchor.

disruptions.title: Red Sea elevated risk zone
disruptions.detail: Ongoing Houthi attacks on commercial shipping. Major carriers rerouting via Cape of Good Hope.

disruptions.title: Panama Canal — reduced slots
disruptions.detail: Gatun Lake water levels 1.8 m below median. Canal Authority restricting Neopanamax transits to 27/day.

disruptions.title: Singapore Strait — enhanced transit advisory
disruptions.detail: Recent armed-robbery incidents near Philip Channel. MPA recommending convoy transits between 0200–0500 local.
